title: Demo Animals
text: A bat is a mammal. A mammal is a vertebrate. A bat uses wings and echolocation. Bat connects to vertebrate through mammal.

title: Semantic Notes
text: title: Semantic Notes body: Climate anxiety describes distress about climate change and ecological loss.

title: Prism Workspace
text: # PRISM Workspace PRISM routing connects query features to evidence traces through selected backends. The workspace compares BM25, Dense, KG, and Hybrid evidence for the same query.
